004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
024import org.thymeleaf.*;
025import org.thymeleaf.templatemode.*;
026
027/**
028 * Mixin that wires Thymeleaf view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Compose into a host resource via
032 * {@link Rest#mixins() @Rest(mixins=ThymeleafMixin.class)}; the host then:
033 *
034 * <ol class='spaced-list'>
035 *    <li>Gains a default mount at {@code /thymeleaf/*} that serves raw {@code .html} templates from
036 *       the importer's classpath by asking the configured
037 *       {@link org.thymeleaf.TemplateEngine TemplateEngine} to render them with the current
038 *       request's locale and attributes available to the template.
039 *    <li>Picks up {@link ThymeleafViewRenderer} automatically via the mixin's
040 *       {@link Rest#responseProcessors() @Rest(responseProcessors=...)} declaration, so
041 *       {@code @RestOp}-method return values of type {@link ThymeleafView} render through the
042 *       Thymeleaf engine without any additional wiring.
043 * </ol>
044 *
045 * <h5 class='figure'>Composition example (microservice):</h5>
046 *
047 * <p class='bjava'>
048 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(path=<js>"/app"</js>, mixins=ThymeleafMixin.<jk>class</jk>)
049 *    <jk>public class</jk> AppResource <jk>extends</jk> RestServlet {
050 *
051 *       <ja>@Bean</ja> ThymeleafMixin thymeleaf() {
052 *          <jk>return</jk> ThymeleafMixin.<jsm>create</jsm>()
053 *             .basePath(<js>"/templates/"</js>)
054 *             .build();
055 *       }
056 *
057 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(<js>"/hello/{name}"</js>)
058 *       <jk>public</jk> View hello(<ja>@Path</ja> String <jv>name</jv>) {
059 *          <jk>return</jk> ThymeleafView.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"hello"</js>).attr(<js>"name"</js>, <jv>name</jv>);
060 *       }
061 *    }
062 * </p>
063 *
064 * <h5 class='section'>Configurable mount path:</h5>
065 *
066 * <p>
067 * The default mount {@code /thymeleaf/*} can be overridden via the SVL variable
068 * {@code ${juneau.thymeleaf.path:thymeleaf}} &mdash; set via system property
069 * ({@code -Djuneau.thymeleaf.path=views}), environment variable
070 * ({@code JUNEAU_THYMELEAF_PATH=views}), or {@code Config} key
071 * ({@code juneau.thymeleaf.path = views}) to change the runtime mount without subclassing.
072 * Resolution happens once at {@link RestContext} construction time (SVL resolution in {@code @RestOp(path)}).
073 *
074 * <h5 class='section'>Mixin-only deployment:</h5>
075 *
076 * <p>
077 * This resource is designed for composition via {@code @Rest(mixins=...)}. The mount path is
078 * pinned at the op level by
079 * {@link RestGet @RestGet(path="/&#123;juneau.thymeleaf.path:thymeleaf&#125;/*")} on {@link #render};
080 * a class-level {@code @Rest(paths=...)} declaration would be silently ignored under the mixin
081 * pattern (see {@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} Javadoc).
082 *
083 * <h5 class='section'>Choosing a TemplateEngine:</h5>
084 *
085 * <p>
086 * The {@code juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf} module ships <b>only</b> the Thymeleaf core API in
087 * {@code provided} scope. <b>No engine bean is bundled.</b> The bridge resolves a
088 * {@link org.thymeleaf.TemplateEngine TemplateEngine} at first use from three sources, in order:
089 *
090 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
091 *    <li><b>Spring Boot autoconfig:</b> {@code spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf} contributes an
092 *       autoconfigured {@code SpringTemplateEngine} (which extends {@code TemplateEngine}); the
093 *       bridge picks it up via {@code BeanStore.getBean(TemplateEngine.class)}. No further wiring
094 *       needed.
095 *    <li><b>User-supplied bean:</b> register a {@code @Bean TemplateEngine} (Spring) or
096 *       {@code BasicBeanStore.put(TemplateEngine.class, engine)} (microservice). Allows full
097 *       control of resolvers, dialects, and template modes.
098 *    <li><b>Bridge default:</b> when nothing is registered, the bridge constructs a default
099 *       {@link org.thymeleaf.TemplateEngine TemplateEngine} with a single
100 *       {@link org.thymeleaf.templateresolver.ClassLoaderTemplateResolver} configured with {@code prefix=basePath},
101 *       {@code suffix=".html"}, {@code templateMode=HTML}, and {@code cacheable=cacheTemplates}
102 *       (default {@code true} &mdash; production-safe; set {@code cacheTemplates(false)} on the
103 *       builder for hot-reload during development).
104 * </ul>
105 *
106 * <p>
107 * When no Thymeleaf engine is on the classpath, the renderer surfaces
108 * {@link ThymeleafViewRenderer#NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC} naming the missing dependency.
109 *
110 * <h5 class='section'>Multiple base paths:</h5>
111 *
112 * <p>
113 * A host with {@code /templates/} and {@code /admin/templates/} template trees registers two
114 * {@code ThymeleafMixin} beans, each mounted via a subclass declaring its own op-level
115 * {@code @RestGet(path=...)} override and its own {@code basePath}. See the
116 * {@code ThymeleafMixin_MockRest_Test} test in {@code juneau-integration-tests} for the canonical
117 * pattern.
118 *
119 * <h5 class='section'>OpenAPI surface:</h5>
120 *
121 * <p>
122 * The greedy {@code /*} handler is not API-meaningful and is excluded from generated
123 * Swagger / OpenAPI specs via {@link OpSwagger#ignore() @OpSwagger(ignore=true)}.
124 *
125 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
126 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ThymeleafView}
127 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ThymeleafViewRenderer}
128 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ThymeleafViewSupport">Thymeleaf View Support</a>
129 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerCompositionMixinsAndPaths">REST Server &mdash; Mixins and Multi-Mount Paths</a>
130 * </ul>
131 *
132 * @since 10.0.0
133 */
134// @formatter:off
135@Rest(
136   responseProcessors={ThymeleafViewRenderer.class}
137)
138@SuppressWarnings({
139   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are Thymeleaf MIME type strings and template attribute keys; intentional
140})
141public class ThymeleafMixin {
142
143   /** Default base path applied when no {@link Builder#basePath(String)} call has been made. */
144   public static final String DEFAULT_BASE_PATH = ThymeleafDispatcher.DEFAULT_BASE_PATH;
145
146   /** Default template-cache flag &mdash; production-safe; opt out per-builder for dev. */
147   public static final boolean DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES = ThymeleafDispatcher.DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES;
148
149   /** Default template mode for the bridge's fallback engine. */
150   public static final TemplateMode DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_MODE = ThymeleafDispatcher.DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_MODE;
151
152   private final ThymeleafDispatcher worker;
153
154   /**
155    * Creates a new builder.
156    *
157    * @return A new builder.
158    */
159   public static Builder create() {
160      return new Builder();
161   }
162
163   /**
164    * No-arg constructor &mdash; uses {@link #DEFAULT_BASE_PATH} as the base path,
165    * {@link #DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES} for the cache flag, and {@link #DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_MODE} for
166    * the template mode.
167    *
168    * <p>
169    * The mixin walk falls back to this constructor when the {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore
170    * BeanStore} does not have a registered {@code ThymeleafMixin} bean.
171    */
172   public ThymeleafMixin() {
173      this(create());
174   }
175
176   /**
177    * Builder constructor.
178    *
179    * @param builder The builder. Must not be {@code null}.
180    */
181   protected ThymeleafMixin(Builder builder) {
182      worker = builder.worker.build();
183   }
184
185   /**
186    * Returns the base path under which template resources are resolved.
187    *
188    * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
189    */
190   public String getBasePath() {
191      return worker.getBasePath();
192   }
193
194   /**
195    * Returns whether the bridge's default engine caches resolved templates.
196    *
197    * @return The cache flag. Defaults to {@link #DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES}.
198    */
199   public boolean isCacheTemplates() {
200      return worker.isCacheTemplates();
201   }
202
203   /**
204    * Returns the template mode used by the bridge's default engine.
205    *
206    * @return The template mode. Defaults to {@link #DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_MODE}.
207    */
208   public TemplateMode getTemplateMode() {
209      return worker.getTemplateMode();
210   }
211
212   /**
213    * Resolves the active {@link TemplateEngine} via the shared {@link ThymeleafDispatcher} worker.
214    *
215    * @param req The current REST request.
216    * @return The active template engine. Never {@code null}.
217    */
218   public TemplateEngine resolveTemplateEngine(RestRequest req) {
219      return worker.resolveTemplateEngine(req);
220   }
221
222   /**
223    * [GET /thymeleaf/*] &mdash; render a raw template through the Thymeleaf engine.
224    *
225    * <p>
226    * The {@code @Path("/*") String path} captures the multi-segment trailing remainder (e.g. a
227    * request for {@code /thymeleaf/about} matches the mount with {@code path = "about"}).
228    * Delegates to the shared {@link ThymeleafDispatcher} worker ({@code .html}-suffix handling,
229    * path-traversal hardening, engine resolution, and render).
230    *
231    * <p>
232    * Missing template surfaces as the engine's own {@code TemplateInputException} (HTTP 500 from
233    * the renderer's catch-all); missing engine surfaces as
234    * {@link ThymeleafViewRenderer#NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC}.
235    *
236    * @param path The trailing path segment after {@code /thymeleaf/} (the template name relative
237    *    to the configured {@link #getBasePath() base path}; trailing {@code .html} stripped).
238    * @param req The current REST request.
239    * @param res The current REST response.
240    * @throws IOException If the underlying response writer fails.
241    * @throws BasicHttpException On boundary violation (403), missing engine (500), or render
242    *    failure (500).
243    */
244   @RestGet(
245      path="/${juneau.thymeleaf.path:thymeleaf}/*",
246      summary="Thymeleaf view",
247      description="Render a raw .html Thymeleaf template under the configured base path.",
248      swagger=@OpSwagger(ignore=true)
249   )
250   public void render(@Path("/*") String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
251         throws IOException, BasicHttpException {
252      worker.render(path, req, res);
253   }
254
255   /**
256    * Builder for {@link ThymeleafMixin}.
257    *
258    * <p>
259    * Mirrors {@link ThymeleafDispatcher.Builder}'s configuration methods on its own surface and
260    * forwards each call into a held {@link ThymeleafDispatcher.Builder} (§2.3.1 worker-bean
261    * composition).
262    */
263   public static class Builder {
264
265      private final ThymeleafDispatcher.Builder worker = ThymeleafDispatcher.create();
266
267      /** Constructor &mdash; package access for {@link ThymeleafMixin#create()}. */
268      protected Builder() {}
269
270      /**
271       * Sets the classpath base path under which template resources are resolved.
272       *
273       * <p>
274       * Defaults to {@link ThymeleafMixin#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH "/"}. A typical configured
275       * value is {@code "/templates/"} &mdash; the Spring-Boot-compatible layout convention.
276       *
277       * @param value The base path. {@code null} or blank values reset to the default
278       *    {@link ThymeleafMixin#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH}.
279       * @return This object.
280       */
281      public Builder basePath(String value) {
282         worker.basePath(value);
283         return this;
284      }
285
286      /**
287       * Sets whether the bridge's default engine caches resolved templates.
288       *
289       * <p>
290       * Defaults to {@code true} (production-safe). Set to {@code false} during development to
291       * pick up edits without restarting the server. This setting only applies to the bridge's
292       * fallback engine; if a {@link TemplateEngine} bean is registered, its own caching
293       * configuration is honored.
294       *
295       * @param value The new value.
296       * @return This object.
297       */
298      public Builder cacheTemplates(boolean value) {
299         worker.cacheTemplates(value);
300         return this;
301      }
302
303      /**
304       * Sets the template mode used by the bridge's default engine.
305       *
306       * <p>
307       * Defaults to {@link TemplateMode#HTML HTML}. Other modes (`XML`, `TEXT`, `JAVASCRIPT`,
308       * `CSS`, `RAW`) work if the user supplies templates in that mode; engines that want
309       * mixed-mode support should register a custom {@code @Bean TemplateEngine} with multiple
310       * resolvers instead.
311       *
312       * @param value The new value. {@code null} resets to {@link #DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_MODE}.
313       * @return This object.
314       */
315      public Builder templateMode(TemplateMode value) {
316         worker.templateMode(value);
317         return this;
318      }
319
320      /**
321       * Reads the current base path setting (test/inspection helper).
322       *
323       * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
324       */
325      public String getBasePath() {
326         return worker.getBasePath();
327      }
328
329      /**
330       * Reads the current cache-templates setting (test/inspection helper).
331       *
332       * @return The cache flag.
333       */
334      public boolean isCacheTemplates() {
335         return worker.isCacheTemplates();
336      }
337
338      /**
339       * Reads the current template-mode setting (test/inspection helper).
340       *
341       * @return The template mode. Never {@code null}.
342       */
343      public TemplateMode getTemplateMode() {
344         return worker.getTemplateMode();
345      }
346
347      /**
348       * Builds the {@link ThymeleafMixin}.
349       *
350       * @return A new {@link ThymeleafMixin} instance.
351       */
352      public ThymeleafMixin build() {
353         return new ThymeleafMixin(this);
354      }
355   }
356}
